title: Smokey Poppy Chicken Wings
description: Crispy chicken wings with a smoky flavor and crunchy poppy seed topping.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together baking powder, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add chicken wings to the bowl and toss to coat evenly.
Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and spray with cooking spray. Arrange chicken wings on the baking sheet.
While the chicken is baking, melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add smokey BBQ sauce to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Remove the chicken from the oven and toss with the BBQ sauce mixture until coated.
Sprinkle poppy seeds on top of the chicken wings.
Return the chicken to the oven and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes.
